overview: MenuCraft is a staff training app for bar and restaurant teams, with drink library, menu items, training steps, and quizzes per position.
features: Positions with categories, sub-categories, and menu items
Drink library with recipes and training steps
Internet Identity login with admin and trainee roles
Theme customization with logo and color accents
Quizzes per position with single and multiple-answer questions
Trainee quiz taking with scoring, pass/fail, and attempt history
Admin quiz management with question editor and reordering
